author: Axios
text: Axios reported that Andrej Karpathy joined Anthropic and would start on the pre-training team.
insight: Anthropic gains a high-credibility researcher and public educator in the team that shapes Claude's core model capability.
impact: Strategic: strengthens Anthropic's frontier research bench and talent narrative.
rationale: Shown because this is a sourced public fact that changes the Claude vs Codex arena narrative.

author: Jason Liu

author: Anthropic

author: Anthropic

author: OpenAI

author: OpenAI
